name: Forced Action
summary: Requiring the user to complete an unwanted action as a condition of completing the wanted one.

evidence.claim: Forced action is listed in Brignull's canonical deceptive-patterns taxonomy.

body.description: The user wants to do X (buy a product, read an article, download software) but is required to do Y first (create an account, give email, install an extension, take a survey) as an enforced gate (E1).
body.llmVerifyPrompt: Given the user's stated goal and the page's gating requirements, determine whether the page requires the user to perform an unrelated action (account creation, email submission, survey completion) to access the intended functionality. Return: {hasForcedAction: boolean, requiredGate: string, originalUserGoal: string}.
body.remediation: Warn the user. If the gate is email-only, recommend a privacy-protecting alternative (masked email, temporary inbox).
